glosses.pt: pista de rolamento; faixa de rodagem

sentences.target: Die Fahrbahn ist heute richtig glatt.

translations.de: Die Fahrbahn ist heute richtig glatt.
translations.en: The road is really slippery today.
translations.es: La carretera está muy resbaladiza hoy.
translations.fr: La route est vraiment glissante aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La strada oggi è davvero scivolosa.
translations.pt: A estrada está muito escorregadia hoje.
translations.nl: De weg is vandaag erg glad.
translations.hi: आज सड़क बहुत फिसलन भरी है.
translations.el: Ο δρόμος είναι πολύ γλιστερός σήμερα.
translations.nb: Veien er veldig glatt i dag.
translations.da: Vejen er virkelig glat i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は道路がすごく滑りやすいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; syntactic subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb; clause-level modifier indicating time.
Degree adverb; intensifies the following adjective 'glatt'.
Predicative adjective; subject complement after the copula.

sentences.target: Wir stehen auf der Fahrbahn im Stau.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃteːən aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈfaːɐ̯baːn ɪm ʃtaʊ̯/

translations.de: Wir stehen auf der Fahrbahn im Stau.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃteːən aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈfaːɐ̯baːn ɪm ʃtaʊ̯/
translations.en: We’re stuck in traffic on the road.
translations.es: Estamos atrapados en un atasco en la carretera.
translations.fr: On est coincés dans les bouchons sur la route.
translations.it: Siamo bloccati nel traffico sulla strada.
translations.ru: Мы застряли в пробке на дороге.
translations.pt: Estamos presos no trânsito na estrada.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang kẹt xe trên đường.
translations.ar: نحن عالقون في ازدحام المرور على الطريق.
translations.nl: We staan vast in de file op de weg.
translations.uk: Ми застрягли в заторі на дорозі.
translations.hi: हम सड़क पर ट्रैफिक में फंसे हुए हैं.
translations.el: Είμαστε κολλημένοι στην κίνηση στον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Vi står fast i trafikken på veien.
translations.sv: Vi sitter fast i trafiken på vägen.
translations.ro: Suntem blocați în trafic pe drum.
translations.da: Vi sidder fast i trafikken på vejen.
translations.ja: 道路で渋滞にはまっています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb; 1st person plural present indicative; intransitive predicate.
Preposition governing dative here; marks static location.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Fahrbahn' after 'auf' (location).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'auf' (prepositional object) in dative.
Contracted form of 'in dem'; functions as a preposition heading a PP and includes the definite article (dative masculine singular).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative masculine singular).

sentences.target: Die Polizei sperrt die Fahrbahn nach einem Unfall.
sentences.reading: /diː poliˈt͡saɪ̯ ˈʃpɛʁt diː ˈfaːɐ̯baːn naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈʊnfal/

translations.de: Die Polizei sperrt die Fahrbahn nach einem Unfall.
translations.ipa: /diː poliˈt͡saɪ̯ ˈʃpɛʁt diː ˈfaːɐ̯baːn naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈʊnfal/
translations.en: The police are closing the road after an accident.
translations.es: La policía está cerrando la carretera después de un accidente.
translations.fr: La police ferme la route après un accident.
translations.it: La polizia sta chiudendo la strada dopo un incidente.
translations.ko: 경찰이 사고 후에 도로를 차단하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 发生事故后，警方正在封路。
translations.yue: 有意外之後，警方封咗路。
translations.pt: A polícia está fechando a estrada após um acidente.
translations.he: המשטרה סוגרת את הכביש אחרי תאונה.
translations.tr: Polis bir kazadan sonra yolu kapatıyor.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát đang phong tỏa con đường sau một tai nạn.
translations.nl: De politie sluit de weg af na een ongeluk.
translations.hu: A rendőrség lezárja az utat egy baleset után.
translations.hi: पुलिस हादसे के बाद सड़क बंद कर रही है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία κλείνει τον δρόμο μετά από ένα ατύχημα.
translations.nb: Politiet stenger veien etter en ulykke.
translations.id: Polisi menutup jalan setelah terjadi kecelakaan.
translations.sv: Polisen stänger av vägen efter en olycka.
translations.ro: Poliția închide drumul după un accident.
translations.da: Politiet lukker vejen efter en ulykke.
translations.ja: 事故の後、警察が道路を封鎖しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject 'Polizei'.
Common noun; feminine; subject/agent of the verb.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; transitive action.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of the direct object 'Fahrbahn'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'sperrt'.
Preposition governing dative; expresses temporal sequence.
Indefinite article; dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Unfall' after 'nach'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'nach' (dative).

sentences.target: Ein Radfahrer fährt auf der falschen Fahrbahn.
sentences.reading: /aɪ̯n ˈʁaːtfaːʁɐ fɛːɐ̯t aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈfalʃn̩ ˈfaːɐ̯baːn/

translations.de: Ein Radfahrer fährt auf der falschen Fahrbahn.
translations.ipa: /aɪ̯n ˈʁaːtfaːʁɐ fɛːɐ̯t aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈfalʃn̩ ˈfaːɐ̯baːn/
translations.en: A cyclist is riding on the wrong side of the road.
translations.es: Un ciclista va en sentido contrario.
translations.zh-Hans: 有个骑自行车的在逆行。
translations.pt: Um ciclista está andando na contramão.
translations.vi: Một người đi xe đạp đang đi ngược chiều.
translations.nl: Een fietser rijdt tegen de rijrichting in.
translations.hu: Egy biciklis a forgalommal szemben megy.
translations.hi: एक साइकिल सवार गलत दिशा में चल रहा है.
translations.el: Ένας ποδηλάτης πάει ανάποδα στον δρόμο.
translations.nb: En syklist sykler på feil side av veien.
translations.sv: En cyklist kör åt fel håll.
translations.ro: Un biciclist merge în sens invers.
translations.da: En cyklist kører i den forkerte retning.
translations.ja: 自転車が逆走しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article; nominative singular masculine; determiner of the subject 'Radfahrer'.
Common noun; masculine; syntactic subject of 'fährt'.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive here with a prepositional phrase indicating location.
Preposition governing dative (location); introduces the PP specifying the surface/way used.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Fahrbahn' after 'auf'.
Attributive adjective; dative singular feminine; modifies 'Fahrbahn'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'auf' (dative).
